title: Xylem Announces Participation at Upcoming Investor Conferences
text: WASHINGTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #LetsSolveWater--Xylem announces participation at upcoming investor conferences in June 2023.

title: Xylem (XYL) Closes Evoqua Deal, Boosts Water Service Portfolio
text: Xylem's (XYL) acquisition of Evoqua bolsters its position in water technologies, solutions and services, and strengthens its foothold in lucrative end markets.

title: TortoiseEcofin Announces Constituent Change Due to Merger and Acquisition Activity
text: LEAWOOD, KS / ACCESSWIRE / May 25, 2023 / TortoiseEcofin today announced that Evoqua Water Technologies Corp (NYSE:AQUA) will be removed from the Ecofin Global Water ESG Index SM (EGWESG) as a result of the approved merger with Xylem Inc (NYSE:XYL). Due to the merger, AQUA will be removed from the index at market open on Friday, May 26, 2023.

title: Xylem (XYL) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Xylem (XYL) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.72 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.62 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.47 per share a year ago.

title: Why Xylem (XYL) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
